hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Speak the Third Ideal

Activation: ∞

The strength of your Nahel bond now allows your spren to manifest more fully in the Physical Realm.

Your spren bond range increases from 30 feet to 100 feet. Additionally, when you spend focus to give your spren a task, it costs you 1 fewer focus (to a minimum cost of 1).
hits.name: Deepened Bond
hits.shortDescription: Your spren bond range increases to 100 feet, and giving your spren a task costs 1 fewer focus.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Abrasion 2+; Progression 2+; Speak the First Ideal

Activation: ∞

You’ve mastered the supernatural grace told of the Edgedancers of yore.

After you start your turn with 1 Investiture or more, you gain an additional R, which you can use only to Avoid Danger or Dodge. If you use the Dodge reaction in this way, ignore its focus cost.
hits.name: Edgedancer’s Grace
hits.shortDescription: After you start your turn with 1 Investiture or more, you gain an additional reaction, which you can use only to Avoid Danger or Dodge.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Level 13+; Speak the Third Ideal

Activation: ★

You seek to become a full Knight Radiant by speaking the Fourth Ideal.

You gain the goal “Speak the Fourth Ideal.” After you complete this goal, you gain the following reward:

  • You become Empowered until the end of that scene.
  • You can call a swarm of lifespren as Radiant Shardplate (see Chapter 7).
hits.name: Fourth Ideal (Edgedancer)
hits.shortDescription: When you complete the goal “Speak the Fourth Ideal,” you become Empowered and can manifest Radiant Shardplate.

elementDisplay.value:

shortDescription.value: When you complete the goal “Speak the Fourth Ideal,” you become Empowered and can manifest Radiant Shardplate.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Varies

Activation: ∞

You learn to hold and wield greater quantities of Stormlight within yourself.

When you acquire this talent, your maximum Investiture increases by a number equal to your tier. When your tier increases by 1, your maximum Investiture does as well.
hits.name: Invested
hits.shortDescription: Your max Investiture increases by your tier.

shortDescription.value: Your max Investiture increases by your tier.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Level 4+; Speak the First Ideal

Activation: ★

You seek to deepen your Nahel bond with your cultivationspren by speaking the Second Ideal.

You gain the goal “Speak the Second Ideal.” After you complete this goal, you gain the following reward:

  • You become Empowered until the end of that scene.
  • Your Enhance action becomes more powerful. While you have 1 Investiture or more, you can use Enhance as ▷, and you don’t need to spend Investiture to use this action or maintain its effect.
hits.name: Second Ideal (Edgedancer)
hits.shortDescription: You seek to deepen your Nahel bond with your cultivationspren by speaking the Second Ideal.

elementDisplay.value:

Activation: ★

  • You become Empowered until the end of that scene.
  • Your Enhance action becomes more powerful. While you have 1 Investiture or more, you can use Enhance as ▷, and you don’t need to spend Investiture to use this action or maintain its effect.

shortDescription.value: You seek to deepen your Nahel bond with your cultivationspren by speaking the Second Ideal.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Speak the Third Ideal

Activation: ★

You begin taking other people under your wing, allowing them to breathe Stormlight and use surges before they’ve established their own Nahel bond.

After a long rest, choose a companion or player character you can influence to take as your squire. To choose them, they must be willing and sapient, you must have known them for at least 1 game session, and they must not have bonded a Radiant spren.

When you choose a squire, decide whether you want to grant them both of your surges, one of them, or none. That character becomes your squire, gaining the surges you chose plus the other benefits in the “Squires” section in chapter 5.

You can have a maximum number of squires up to your current Ideal (such as three for the Third Ideal). If you already have the maximum number of squires, you must choose one to dismiss as your squire before choosing a new one.
hits.name: Take Squire (Edgedancer)
hits.shortDescription: You can choose a squire, granting them one or both of your surges.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Level 8+; Speak the Second Ideal

Activation: ★

You seek to advance your Nahel bond even further by speaking the Third Ideal.

You gain the goal “Speak the Third Ideal.” After you complete this goal, you gain the following reward:

  • You become Empowered until the end of that scene.
  • You can summon your spren as a Radiant Shardblade (see Chapter 7).
hits.name: Third Ideal (Edgedancer)
hits.shortDescription: When you complete the goal “Speak the Third Ideal,” you become Empowered and can manifest your spren as a Radiant Shardblade.

hits.elementDisplay:
Prerequisite: Invested talent

Activation: ★

You can use Stormlight to rapidly recover from injuries.

When you use the Regenerate free action, you can spend Investiture to instantly recover from an injury of your choice (either instead of or in addition to healing yourself). Spend 2 Investiture to recover from a temporary injury, or spend 3 Investiture to recover from a permanent one.
hits.name: Wound Regeneration
hits.shortDescription: When you Regenerate, spend 2 Investiture to recover from a temporary injury, or spend 3 Investiture to recover from a permanent one.
